subject: [VES-OAPI-SDC-DIST] Updgrade ves-openapi to kafka native
commit_message:
[VES-OAPI-SDC-DIST] Updgrade ves-openapi to kafka native

Upggrade ves-openapi-manager to use kafka native

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: I8f796ce6b18f007b4cdf31b79f2ac5d9ab0ec37a
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1809
